summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AssetKraft landing page. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend loads correctly with proper design implementation. Identified one critical chatbot UI integration issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot button found but chat window doesn't open when clicked

integration_issues.issue: Form submission status unclear - no visible success message displayed

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Hero video autoplays and loops correctly
Contact form accepts input and submits
Modern design with proper teal/green and yellow color scheme
All main sections present (Hero, Portfolio, Calculator, Team, Testimonials, Contact, Footer)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chatbot UI integration - button exists but chat window fails to open. Verify contact form success message display. Both backend APIs are working perfectly.
